name: sysGetVariableTimeNS
title: sysGetVariableTimeNS
description: Returns the time stamp of the last update to the variable value.
Direct access to values from system variables.

parameters.name: SysVarName
parameters.description: Name of the fully qualified name of the system variable, including all name spaces, separated by "::". The name must be preceded by "sysVar::".

return: Time stamp of the last update to the variable value, in nanoseconds since measurement start.
